description: Deterministic syntax-closure burn-down contract for systemverilog.ebnf (no-regression baseline). Entry rule is sv_multi_entry_root, a synthetic union of the three legitimate top-level entries (systemverilog_file, library_text, systemverilog_parseable_file) used so the gate's single-entry static analyzer can see all reach-sets at once. Long-term tooling fix: extend ast_pipeline --entry-rule to accept a list and remove sv_multi_entry_root.
